## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (bug fixes include a regression test)
- [ ] Both backends agree — the js/interp cross-check passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] No third-party Pine engine code was copied (clean-room — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
